# Suraj Kumar Chandravanshi — SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist
# https://surajkchandravanshi.vercel.app/
# llms.txt — AI-readable site index for large language models

## About

Suraj Kumar Chandravanshi is a Delhi-based SEO and Digital Marketing Specialist with 4+ years of experience helping B2B and B2C brands grow through organic search, paid advertising, and content marketing. He works with tools including Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, WordPress, and Canva.

- Name: Suraj Kumar Chandravanshi
- Location: Delhi, India
- Role: SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist
- Email: surajkrchandravanshi@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/surajkofficial/
- Open to: Full-time roles, freelance projects, international opportunities (Germany, Australia, UAE)

## Services Offered

- SEO strategy, technical audits, keyword research, on-page and off-page optimisation
- Google Ads and Meta paid advertising campaign management
- Social media strategy and content calendar management
- WordPress website management and SEO publishing
- Marketing performance reporting and analytics dashboards
